name: Email Triage Workflow
description: Summarizes unread Gmail items, writes a triage memo and reply draft artifacts, and keeps email sending approval-gated.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). This template aligns with the repeatable TaskScenario flow.

params.content:
# Email Triage

Generated: {{run_utc_now}}
Tone: {{reply_tone}}

## Triage Output

{{gmail_triage}}

## Suggested Reply Draft

Use the triage above to write a short reply with these parts:
- Acknowledge receipt
- Confirm the requested action or next step
- Mention any blocker or missing detail
- Close with the next date or action owner

content.notes: Reply drafts are prepared locally only; sending remains approval-gated.

params.message: 📧 Email triage memo written to {{triage_output_path}} and reply drafts to {{reply_drafts_path}}
